seo_data.generated_keywords: POCO X7 Pro, Dimensity 8400-Ultra, 1.5K AMOLED, 120Hz, 90W HyperCharge, 6000mAh, 50MP OIS camera, IP68, HyperOS 2, LPDDR5X, UFS 4.0, LiquidCool
seo_data.meta_title: POCO X7 Pro: Flagship Performance with 1.5K AMOLED & 90W Charge
seo_data.meta_description: Experience the POCO X7 Pro with Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra, CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display, 90W HyperCharge, 50MP OIS camera, and IP68 durability.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The POCO X7 Pro stands out as a high-performance smartphone designed for demanding users. Featuring the Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra chipset built on a 4nm process with ARM Cortex-A725 CPU architecture, it delivers exceptional gaming and multitasking capabilities, achieving an impressive AnTuTu score of 1,704,330. This performance is further enhanced by LPDDR5X RAM and UFS 4.0 storage, ensuring smooth and reliable operation, complemented by advanced LiquidCool Technology 4.0 with a 5000mm² ultra-large loop pump for sustained peak performance.

Beyond raw power, the POCO X7 Pro offers an immersive visual experience on its CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display, boasting 3200 nits peak brightness, 12-bit color depth, and Corning Gorilla Glass 7i protection. Photography is handled by a versatile 50MP main camera with OIS for stable shots, alongside an 8MP ultrawide and a 20MP front camera. The device is built for durability with an IP68 dust and water resistance rating, houses a substantial 6000mAh (typ) battery, and supports blazing-fast 90W HyperCharge, achieving a full charge in just 42 minutes.

range_overview:
The POCO X7 Pro redefines speed and performance, powered by the flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra processor. This 4nm chipset features the world-first ARM Cortex-A725 CPU architecture, providing a significant boost in CPU and GPU performance, alongside a 50% improvement in NPU AI performance compared to its predecessor. Coupled with LPDDR5X RAM and UFS 4.0 storage, it offers configurations up to 12GB + 512GB, delivering a smooth and responsive user experience for gaming, multitasking, and demanding applications. The device incorporates WildBoost Optimization 3.0 and the POCO 3D IceLoop System (LiquidCool Technology 4.0) with a 5000mm² ultra-large loop pump to maintain optimal temperatures and sustained performance during intense use.

Visually, the POCO X7 Pro impresses with its 6.67-inch CrystalRes 1.5K AMOLED display, offering a resolution of 2712 x 1220 pixels, a 120Hz refresh rate, and a peak brightness of 3200 nits. The display supports Dolby Vision and HDR10+, features 1920Hz PWM dimming, and is protected by Corning Gorilla Glass 7i. For photography, it boasts a 50MP main camera with OIS (f/1.5 aperture, 1/1.95" sensor size), capable of 4K video recording at up to 60fps, complemented by an 8MP ultrawide camera and a 20MP front camera. The device's robust build includes IP68 dust and water resistance for enhanced durability.

Battery life is a key highlight, with a 6000mAh (typical) Si/C Li-Ion battery that supports 90W HyperCharge, enabling a full charge to 100% in approximately 42 minutes. The phone runs on Android 15 with Xiaomi HyperOS 2, providing a refined user interface and smart performance scheduling for improved energy efficiency. Connectivity options include Dual SIM 5G, Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax), Bluetooth 6.0, GPS (L1+L5), GLONASS, BDS, GALILEO, NavIC, NFC (market dependent), and an Infrared port. Audio is delivered through dual speakers with Dolby Atmos support, and the device is Hi-Res Audio and Hi-Res Wireless Audio certified. Available storage and RAM variants include 8GB+256GB, 12GB+256GB, and 12GB+512GB.

The design features dimensions of 160.8 x 75.2 x 8.3 mm and a weight of 195g (plastic back) or 198g (silicone polymer/eco leather back). Security is managed by an in-screen fingerprint sensor and AI Face Unlock. The comprehensive package includes the mobile phone, adapter, USB Type-C cable, SIM eject tool, protective case, safety information, quick start guide, and a warranty card, though contents may vary by region.
sales_arguments: Experience flagship-level performance with the Dimensity 8400-Ultra processor, achieving an AnTuTu score of 1,704,330.
Immerse yourself in visuals on the CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display with 3200 nits peak brightness and Dolby Vision.
Stay powered throughout the day with a 6000mAh (typ) battery and recharge to 100% in just 42 minutes using 90W HyperCharge.
Capture stunning photos and videos with the 50MP main camera featuring Optical Image Stabilization (OIS) and 4K@60fps recording.
Enjoy enhanced durability and peace of mind with IP68 dust and water resistance, providing strong protection against elements.

technical_specifications.Display Type: 6.67" CrystalRes AMOLED, 68 Billion colors, 120Hz, 1920Hz PWM Dimming, Dolby Vision, HDR10+
technical_specifications.Display Resolution: 2712 x 1220 pixels (1.5K Resolution), 20:9 ratio (~446 ppi density)
technical_specifications.Charging: 90W wired HyperCharge (100% in 42 mins), PD3.0, QC3+
technical_specifications.Connectivity: Wi-Fi 802.11 a/b/g/n/ac/6 (dual-band, Wi-Fi Direct), Bluetooth 6.0, NFC (market dependent), Infrared Port
technical_specifications.Network: GSM / HSPA / LTE / 5G (Dual SIM, dual standby 5G+5G, 5G+4G)
technical_specifications.Weight: 195 g (plastic back) or 198 g (silicone polymer back)
technical_specifications.Build Materials: Glass front (Gorilla Glass 7i), plastic back, silicone polymer back (eco leather)
technical_specifications.Audio: Dual speakers, Dolby Atmos, Hi-Res Audio, Hi-Res Wireless Audio, No 3.5mm jack
technical_specifications.Sensors: In-screen Fingerprint (optical), Accelerometer, Gyro, Proximity, Compass, IR blaster
technical_specifications.Cooling System: LiquidCool Technology 4.0, POCO 3D IceLoop system (5000mm² ultra-large loop pump)
